title: oriastrum stuebelii
intro: Oriastrum stuebelii is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oriastrum stuebelii include relief from gastrointestinal problems, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
